title: Multi-session chat CRUD
summary: Create, list, rename, delete chat sessions; one default per user.

title: SSE streaming replies
summary: Token-by-token SSE streaming of assistant replies with Markdown rendering.

title: Long-dialog session memory
summary: JDBC-backed session memory with turn-window compaction (20 turns / 4000 tokens).

title: Harness agent progress
summary: Collapsible agent panel showing tool calls, pipeline stages, and reasoning.

title: Optional MCP enrichment
summary: Runtime MCP catalog; per-chat MCP toggles; chat must work without MCP.

title: Thymeleaf chat UI
summary: SSR chat page with sidebar CRUD, SSE consumption, and per-chat MCP panel.
